title: Public Records Request: BWC/Dash-Cam (Case #2025-00003532) - Cayla Anne Geib

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

This is a formal request for all body-worn camera (BWC) and dash-camera footage related to the arrest of Cayla Anne Geib on May 7, 2025.

To ensure the requested footage covers the specific legal and evidentiary elements of the case, please include the following segments:

Standardized Field Sobriety Tests (SFSTs): Full coverage of the roadside sobriety evaluation, including any dash-cam footage that provides a wide-angle view of the subject's physical performance.

The "Resisting" Incident: All footage capturing the specific interaction that led to the charge of Resisting Officer Without Violence. We are specifically looking for the verbal and physical dialogue during the handcuffing or transport process.

Breathalyzer/BAC Evidence: Footage capturing the administration of the breath test (Intoxilyzer), the observation period, and the verbal announcement of the results (BAC levels) or the subject's refusal to provide a sample.

Please provide a secure link for digital download once the redacted files are ready for release

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Petro Vozniuk

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I would like to pull the CAD reports and recordings for 911 calls about medical emergencies involving children under the age of 14 at Murphy Harpst Children's Center at 747 Fletcher Street in 2025. This should include calls under the categories: Unresponsive/Unconscious, Convulsions, Stroke, Difficult Breathing, Chest Pains, Medical Evaluations, Falls, Broken Bones, Bleeding, Eye Injury, and General Pains. I'm mostly interested in calls that required an ambulance to be dispatched. I am also requesting witness statements, body/dash cam surveillance and/or audio, and photos from dispatches to Murphy Harpst when police responded to these 911 calls.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Maya Martin

communications.communication:

title: Body Worn Camera Footage: Kimberly Ahilyn Gonzales (Arrest Date: 01/29/2024)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting ONLY Body Worn Camera (BWC) footage related to the arrest of Kimberly Ahilyn Gonzales (DOB: 01/08/2001) on January 29, 2024 (Case Nos: 24CT500317, 24MM020360).

SPECIFIC EXCLUSIONS: > Please EXCLUDE all dash-cam (in-car) video, surveillance footage, and any other recordings that are NOT from a body-worn camera. I am only interested in the BWC footage of the responding and arresting officers.

The request covers the period from the initial contact through the completion of the arrest process.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Petro Vozniuk

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Wyoming Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

- The number of license plates scanned with Flock Safety automated license plate readers over the last 30 days
- The names of the hot lists/watch lists used with Flock Safety automated license plate readers between April 2025 and when this request is fulfilled
- The entire search history within the Flock Safety system between April 2025 and when this request is fulfilled, including: Date/time, entire search string, officer name(s) who conducted the search, and officer name(s) who authorized the search
- The retention period for any non-image data that is not currently used as evidence in a criminal investigation
- The names of all the agencies with which data is shared with through the Flock Safety automated license plate reader system between April 2025 and when this request is fulfilled
- The names of all the agencies from which data is received through the Flock Safety automated license plate reader system between April 2025 and when this request is fulfilled
- All agreements will local homeowner associations or private business or individuals for access to Flock Safety systems
- All contracts, MOUs, or other agreements with Flock Safety
- All procurement documents related to Flock Safety
- Any other records including electronic records, audiotapes, videotapes, and photographs, as well as letters, emails, facsimiles, telephone messages, voice mail messages and transcripts, notes, and minutes of any meetings

In the event some portions of the requested records are properly exempt from disclosure, please disclose any reasonably segregable non-exempt portions of the requested records. If it is your position that a document contains non-exempt segments, but that those non-exempt segments are so dispersed throughout the document as to make segregation impossible, please state what portion of the document is non-exempt, and how the material is dispersed throughout the document. If a request is denied in whole, please state specifically that it is not reasonable to segregate portions of the record for release.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 7 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Alex Kirby
